transcription.text: hi look at how great you look thank you i feel like i've been on a diet my entire life i even cut out bread and pasta for a day and then i tried noom i feel like anyone could use noom it's an easy to stick to program that actually changed my habits it changed the way i look at food they say it's based on a cognitive behavioral approach i just say it works it just clicked it worked it worked with noom visit noom.com and lose the weight for good you
